description: Hindi schwa-deletion minimal pairs. Each entry: a Devanagari surface form and the expected phoneme stream. The cases focus on the rule that v1 (no G2P) consistently got wrong: word-final schwa drop. We do NOT exercise medial-schwa-drop here -- it's deferred to v1.4 along with the deeper rule pack.

cases.name: namaskar — single word, classic word-final schwa drop
kamal — final schwa drops, medial retained
raam — long /aa/ matra survives, no schwa to drop
gaon — anusvara stays nasal, schwa drops
ghar — aspirate stays distinct from g
